creator: johannes.kunde@gmail.com
text:
Problem is solved with https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/devel/rubygem-json_schemer/Makefile?revision=546205&view=markup

I tried to update the port a little earlier on revsion 546185, which did not contain the relevant changes:

# svn diff -r 546185:HEAD
Index: Makefile
===================================================================
--- Makefile    (revision 546185)
+++ Makefile    (revision 546226)
@@ -10,7 +10,6 @@
 COMMENT=       Ruby JSON schema validator
 
 LICENSE=       MIT
-LICENSE_FILE=  ${WRKSRC}/LICENSE.md
 
 RUN_DEPENDS=   rubygem-ecma-re-validator>=0.2<1:devel/rubygem-ecma-re-validator \
                rubygem-hana>=1.3<2:devel/rubygem-hana \
